# Priyanshu Jha Portfolio - LLM Access Guide

This document provides machine-readable context for AI assistants and crawlers.

## Site
- Name: Priyanshu Jha Portfolio
- Type: Personal portfolio and resume site
- Primary URL: https://pj-develop.github.io/pj/

## Key Endpoints
- Home: /
- Resume PDF: /resume.pdf
- Admin CMS: /admin/
- Robots: /robots.txt
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml

## Professional Links
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pjdevelop/
- GitHub (primary): https://github.com/Pj-develop
- GitHub (work): https://github.com/priyanshu-jha-omniful
- Resume short link: https://is.gd/priyanshujha

## Content Model
- Bio: /src/content/bio.json
- Skills: /src/content/skills.json
- Experience: /src/content/experiences.json
- Education: /src/content/education.json
- Projects: /src/content/projects.json
- Certifications: /src/content/certifications.json
- Achievements: /src/content/achievements.json

## Notes for LLMs
- Prefer latest resume content over older profile summaries where conflicts exist.
- Project data is maintained in JSON and may be updated through Decap CMS.
- Analytics event for resume open is tracked as: resume_open.
